channel.title: cli on Zellij
channel.description: Recent content in cli on Zellij

item.title: Zellij 0.44.0: Remote Sessions, Windows Support, CLI Automation
item.description: var playerElement = document.getElementById("player-wrapper"); var player = new Clappr.Player({ source: "/video/version-044-intro.mp4", mute: false, height: 540, width: 960 }); player.attachTo(playerElement); Zellij 0.44.0 has just been released! Check it out! Some highlights: Native Windows Support Layout Manager Terminal-to-Terminal Attach over HTTPS Read-Only Session Sharing CLI Automation Resize Panes with the Mouse Click-to-Open File Paths New Session Manager UI New Rust APIs Infrastructure Overhaul Please Support the Zellij Developer ❤️ Native Windows Support Zellij now runs natively on Windows(!
